---
title: "Ellen Misselbrook"
---

## Ellen Misselbrook

**Dates:** (1856-?1904)

### Description

ladies’ maid

### Biography

Daughter of Robert Misselbrook, shoemaker of Otterbourne,  she was maid to Mary Coleridge from at least 1881, and came to work for CMY in 1901 just before her death. She was sister of Alice (Misselbrook) Rolfe, the Otterbourne schoolmistress. [1861 census, Otterbourne; 1881 census spelt Miselbrook]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 26th  [1901]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
